Test01-JUL-2018Specimen

Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low serum protein and globulin, and significant proteinuria, suggesting impaired renal function, likely nephrotic syndrome or advanced chronic kidney disease. Urine findings (protein, glucose, ketones, low specific gravity, acidic pH, brown color) further support renal dysfunction and possible metabolic derangement. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and further workup.
